title: Bayi's Create Sykblock Loot Table
description: Loot table changes for Skyblock with Create
body:
The following mobs have changed loots:

# Husks

Added the following items:
- Sand
- Zinc ingot

# Zombies

Added the following items:
- Andesite

# Tropical Fish

Now drop all variants for coral

# Wither

Drops Ancient debris (only if killed by player)

## Fishing

### Junk

Added the following items (in a seperate pool):
- Kelp
- Sugar cane
- Sea pickle
- Pointed dripstone
